evals.prompt: I have a Databricks SQL + Python data project. There are .sql files in transforms/ and Python files in src/. I already have a pyproject.toml with some ruff settings. Set up prek for me.
evals.expected_output: prek.toml with [[repos]] for ruff-pre-commit and a local sqlfmt hook (no prettier), pyproject.toml updated with ruff+sqlfmt settings, prek install run
expectations: prek.toml has a repo = "https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff-pre-commit" entry with ruff-check and ruff-format hooks
prek.toml has a repo = "local" entry with a sqlfmt hook
prek.toml does NOT contain a prettier hook (no TS files)
pyproject.toml contains [tool.ruff] with indent-width = 4 and line-length = 120
prek install is run to wire up the git hook

evals.prompt: I just ran init-app-stack and have a full-stack project with a Python FastAPI backend (backend/) and a TypeScript Vite frontend (frontend/). Set up prek for the whole monorepo.
evals.expected_output: prek.toml with ruff-pre-commit and local prettier hook, .prettierrc written, pyproject.toml updated, prek install run
expectations: prek.toml has ruff-pre-commit repo with ruff-check and ruff-format hooks
prek.toml has a local prettier hook for .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx files
.prettierrc is written with tabWidth: 4 and useTabs: false and printWidth: 120

evals.prompt: I have a TypeScript/React project (no Python, no SQL). Add prek with prettier for pre-commit formatting.
evals.expected_output: prek.toml with only a local prettier hook, .prettierrc written, prek install run
expectations: prek.toml has ONLY a local prettier hook (no ruff-pre-commit, no sqlfmt repos)
.prettierrc is written with tabWidth: 4 and useTabs: false and printWidth: 120
prek install is run to wire up the git hook
User is told which formatters were installed and how to run manually
